title: Where the Streets Have No Name
why_this_song: Where the Streets Have No Name by U2 (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Where the streets have no name (Oh-oh)"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Where the streets have no name (Oh-oh)"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "And when I go there"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "We're still building and burning down love"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "We're still building and burning down love"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

lines: Where the streets have no name
Where the streets have no name
We're still building and burning down love
Where the streets have no name (Oh-oh)
I wanna feel sunlight on my face
I see the dust-cloud disappear without a trace
I wanna take shelter from the poison rain, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "streets" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "streets" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "name" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wanna run, I want to hide

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wanna reach out and touch the flame

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask U2 one question about "Where the Streets Have No Name", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para U2 sobre "Where the Streets Have No Name", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Where the Streets Have No Name" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Where the Streets Have No Name" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Where the Streets Have No Name" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Where the Streets Have No Name" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
